title: andryala pinnatifida subsp. antonii
intro: Andryala pinnatifida subsp. antonii, also known as the Antoni's Andryala, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is characterized by its pinnate leaves and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Andryala pinnatifida subsp. antonii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
